factual: The ASR Outdoor 8pc Gold Rush Kit includes a 10 inch diameter green gold pan, two 3mL dropper pipettes, a 2 inch metal testing stone, three 2 dram glass collection vials, and a 2 inch by 2 inch graphite crucible.
sales: Everything you need to get started prospecting is in one box: sift and pan for gold, use the dropper pipettes to lift fine flakes or liquid, test what you find with the metal testing stone, and store your finds safely in the collection vials. It is a great starter set for beginners and a handy restock for seasoned gold rush fanatics.
bullets: Green 10 Inch Gold Pan: Deep green color helps you spot gold and other specimens against dirt and sediment
Dropper Pipettes: Two 3mL pipettes sized for absorbing gold, liquid, or other small particles
Metal Testing Stone: 2 inch stone used to help determine the type of metal you have located
Glass Collection Vials: Three 2 dram vials for storing small finds and keeping them contained
Graphite Crucible: 2 inch by 2 inch crucible included in the set
mobile: The ASR Outdoor 8pc Gold Rush Kit includes a 10 inch green gold pan, two 3mL dropper pipettes, a 2 inch metal testing stone, three 2 dram glass vials, and a 2 inch by 2 inch graphite crucible, everything a beginner or hobbyist needs to sift, locate, test, and store gold and minerals.

factual: The Kidplokio Dinosaur Robot Toy walks forward on its own using rollers under its tail and feet, with LED eyes and mouth that light up in red, blue, and green and realistic roaring and stomping sounds. It measures 14.5 x 9.75 x 4 inches, weighs 1.20 lbs, and runs on 2 AA batteries, not included. Available in green or white, it is recommended for ages 3 to 9.
sales: Let your little paleontologist lead their own prehistoric adventure. The dinosaur walks and roars all on its own with no remote needed, and an on and off button lets you switch to quiet play whenever needed. Along the way, kids build fine and gross motor skills and imaginative thinking through hands on pretend play.
bullets: Self Walking Robot: Moves forward unassisted using rollers under the tail and both feet
Lights and Sounds: LED eyes and mouth light up red, blue, and green with realistic roars and stomps
Easy to Use Design: Simple controls let toddlers and kids engage in pretend play right away
Quiet Play Option: Built in on and off button for quiet play when needed
Specifications: Measures 14.5 x 9.75 x 4 inches, weighs 1.20 lbs, requires 2 AA batteries not included, recommended ages 3 to 9
mobile: The Kidplokio Dinosaur Robot Toy walks and roars on its own with light up eyes and mouth in red, blue, and green. It measures 14.5 x 9.75 x 4 inches, runs on 2 AA batteries not included, and comes in green or white for kids ages 3 to 9.

factual: The Universal Tool Ice Tempered Barber Scissors measure approximately 5.5 inches and are made from ice tempered stainless steel, which holds an edge longer than regular stainless steel. Silver in color, they include a built in thumb rest for added comfort.
sales: Built for stylists, barbers, and cosmetologists who need a shear that stays sharp through a full day of cuts, these scissors give you a comfortable, secure grip so you can work with confidence. They also make a fun, useful gift or stocking stuffer for anyone in the beauty industry.
bullets: Ice Tempered Steel: Professional grade construction that holds an edge longer than regular stainless steel

factual: The ASR Outdoor 550 paracord is made from type III commercial grade heavy duty nylon with 7 strands surrounded by a protective nylon cover. Each roll includes 100 feet of black cordage that wraps down to about 7 inches, with a 550 pound breaking strength, 220 pound workload, 3.96mm diameter, and 5/32 inch thickness.
sales: Soft and comfortable enough to knot by hand yet strong enough to trust in an emergency, this paracord earns its place in any camping bag, backpack, car, or boat. Use it for binding gear, rigging a tarp ridgeline, starting a fire, building shelter, or making quick repairs out in the field.
bullets: Heavy Duty Nylon Construction: Type III commercial grade nylon with 7 strands and a protective outer cover
550 Pound Breaking Strength: Rated for a 220 pound workload with a 3.96mm diameter and 5/32 inch thickness
Compact and Lightweight: 100 feet of black cordage wraps down to about 7 inches for easy storage
Versatile Survival Cord: Useful for binding, tarp ridgelines, fire starting, shelter building, and gear repair
mobile: The ASR Outdoor 550 paracord is made from type III commercial grade nylon with 7 strands and a protective cover. Each roll holds 100 feet of black cordage, wraps to about 7 inches, and is rated for a 550 pound breaking strength and 220 pound workload, great for camping, hiking, and emergency use.

factual: The ASR Outdoor 4pc Clamp and Carabiner Set includes durable ABS plastic tarp clamps and aluminum carabiners that will not rust. The clamps measure 3.25 x 1 inch and the carabiners measure 2.75 inches, and the carabiners are not rated for climbing.
sales: Tie down awnings and camping tarps with confidence in rain or shine, then clip the clamps to the included carabiners for easy storage when not in use. The carabiners also come in handy for carrying grocery bags, organizing keys with the built in key ring, or keeping gear accessible on a backpack, in your car, RV, or boat.
bullets: Rugged Tarp Clamps: High quality ABS plastic built tough and weatherproof for awnings, tarps, fabric, party tents, and pipe frames
Rust Resistant Carabiners: Made of aluminum, not rated for climbing use
Convenient Key Rings: Each carabiner includes a key ring for attaching keys, lanyards, and other essentials
4 Piece Set: Clamps measure 3.25 x 1 inch and carabiners measure 2.75 inches
mobile: The ASR Outdoor 4pc Clamp and Carabiner Set pairs tough ABS plastic tarp clamps with rust resistant aluminum carabiners, each with a key ring, for tying down awnings and tarps and keeping gear organized. Carabiners are not rated for climbing.

factual: The ASR Outdoor 8 inch Dual Riffle Gold Pan is molded from one piece of high impact ABS plastic in green. It features both deep and shallow riffles cut into the sidewalls and is UV resistant, rust free, and floats.
sales: Use the deep riffles to rough out raw material and the shallow riffles to finish off your heavy gold concentrates, taking much of the hard work out of panning. Lightweight and tough, it is built to hold up through years of gold prospecting for newcomers and seasoned prospectors alike.
bullets: Dual Riffle Design: Deep and shallow side wall riffles allow better separation of gold from other heavy minerals
High Impact ABS Plastic: One piece molded construction that is lightweight, rust free, UV resistant, and floats
Maximum Gold Recovery: Riffle technology helps collect alluvial gold particles of all sizes, including fine specs
Before First Use: Season the pan by washing off factory production oils
mobile: The ASR Outdoor 8 inch Dual Riffle Gold Pan is molded from one piece of high impact, UV resistant ABS plastic in green, with deep and shallow riffles cut into the sidewalls for better separation of gold from other heavy minerals during panning.

factual: Gear Aid Rubber Boot Saver is a rubber conditioner and UV protectant designed for use on muck boots, rubber boots, plastic, neoprene, or vinyl.
sales: Sun damage, blooming, and excessive drying can wreak havoc on rubber gear over time. A quick treatment with Rubber Boot Saver moisturizes and restores shine while protecting against UV exposure, dirt, and oils, so your rubber boots and gear look their best and last longer.
bullets: Rubber Conditioner and Protectant: Moisturizes rubber, plastic, neoprene, and vinyl
UV Protection: Guards against sun damage and degradation
Restores Appearance: Brings back shine to dulled or worn rubber
Prevents Blooming: Helps remove white marks from rubber surfaces
Keeps Gear Clean: Helps keep dirt and oils off treated surfaces
mobile: Gear Aid Rubber Boot Saver is a rubber conditioner and UV protectant for muck boots, rubber boots, plastic, neoprene, and vinyl gear. It restores shine, prevents blooming and white marks, and protects against sun damage so your gear lasts longer.

factual: The Universal Tool Polishing and Buffing Wheel has a 2 inch diameter and a 1/4 inch shank, and is constructed of soft white muslin cloth in 40 layers.

factual: The ASR Outdoor Full Tang Hunting Knife has an overall length of 11 inches, with a 6.25 inch blade and a 4.75 inch handle. The blade is constructed of 3CR13 stainless steel with a rainbow finish, and the ergonomic handle is made of tough ABS plastic. It includes a nylon sheath with a belt loop.
sales: Whether you are hunting, fishing, or exploring the backcountry, this full tang knife is built to travel with you. The textured ABS handle keeps your grip steady, the stainless steel blade resists rust, and the eye catching rainbow finish makes it a standout piece for collectors too.
bullets: Full Tang Fixed Blade: 11 inch overall length with a 6.25 inch blade and 4.75 inch handle

factual: This Wood Burning Pen and Soldering Tips Set includes a wood burning pen, six assorted soldering tips, a hot knife chuck for a hot blade, and a safety stand, for ten pieces total. It runs on 25 watts, 110 to 120V, 60Hz, and is UL approved.
sales: This kit puts everything you need for wood burning and light soldering work in one box, so you can move between projects without hunting down extra tips. It is a solid addition to a woodworking, hobby, crafting, or home improvement tool collection.

new_title: 10pc Wood Burning Pen Soldering Tool Kit with Tips and Stand

factual: The ASR Outdoor 1000 Lumen Rechargeable Headlamp is a 10 watt LED headlamp with a 2000mAh lithium battery offering up to 20 hours of light, UL certified batteries, and an included USB charging cable. It measures 10.5 x 7 x 4.5 inches, weighs 0.7 lb, and is black.
sales: Never get caught in the dark at camp again. The zoom function adjusts from a focused spotlight to a wide flood beam, the head pivots for directional light, and the contoured, adjustable strap keeps it comfortable for hours of hiking, fishing, cycling, or working on craft projects.
bullets: 1000 Lumen Output: 10 watt LED with a 2000mAh lithium battery for up to 20 hours of light

factual: This 2 pack Emergency Hammer features double sided steel hammer points for shattering side and rear windows and a safeguarded razor blade for cutting through seat belts. Each hammer includes a black mounting bracket for installation on a roof, dash, or console, a bright orange plastic body, and a glow in the dark pin.
sales: In a wrecked or submerged vehicle, seconds count. Mount one within reach so it is ready the instant doors jam or a seat belt locks, and count on the bright orange body and glow in the dark pin to help you find it fast, even in the dark or murky water.
bullets: Dual Sided Steel Points: Hardened steel shatters car windows in an emergency
Safeguarded Razor Blade: Cuts through seat belts to help free you and your passengers
Mounting Bracket Included: Black bracket keeps the hammer within reach on a roof, dash, or console
Glow in the Dark Pin: Helps you locate the hammer in low light or murky water
Compact and Bright: Lightweight orange plastic body for easy spotting
mobile: This 2 pack Emergency Hammer has double sided steel points to shatter windows and a safeguarded razor blade to cut seat belts, plus a mounting bracket, bright orange body, and glow in the dark pin so it is easy to find and use in a vehicle emergency.

factual: This auto emergency hammer combines a recessed seat belt cutting blade with a pointed steel hammer head that has a red plastic protective cover, designed to help free occupants trapped in a vehicle after an accident.
sales: A car accident can trap you behind a jammed seat belt or powerless electric windows in seconds. Keep this compact tool in your glove box or emergency kit so you are always ready to cut free and break out, and it doubles as a thoughtful gift or stocking stuffer.
bullets: Essential Auto Safety Tool: Designed to help you escape quickly after a car accident
Seatbelt Cutter: Recessed razor edged blade prevents cuts while allowing quick escape from restraints
Window Breaker: Pointed steel hammer head shatters car windows to assist escape
Reflective Head Tag: Helps with quick spotting in emergency conditions
Compact Size: Fits easily in a glove box, making it a good stocking stuffer
mobile: This auto emergency hammer pairs a recessed seat belt cutting blade with a pointed steel hammer head covered by a red plastic guard, plus a reflective head tag for quick spotting, so you can escape a jammed or submerged vehicle after an accident.

factual: This ASR Outdoor Mini Classifier Sifting Screen is a 6 inch diameter sieve with 30 holes per square inch, made from high impact ABS plastic formed around 304 stainless steel wire mesh, in green.
sales: Reducing raw material down to a manageable size is one of the first steps to successful gold prospecting, and this classifier makes quick work of it. Compact and stackable, it is easy to carry, easy to store, and a great match for beginners as well as experienced prospectors.
bullets: 30 Holes Per Square Inch Mesh: Sifts material to this specific size for classifying and separating
Stackable Design: Combine with other classifiers to sift material incrementally
Lightweight and Durable: High impact ABS plastic formed around 304 stainless steel wire mesh
Compact 6 Inch Diameter: Easy to carry and store, ideal for small panning operations and day trips
mobile: This ASR Outdoor Mini Classifier Sifting Screen is a 6 inch, 30 holes per square inch sieve made from high impact ABS plastic and 304 stainless steel wire mesh, stackable and compact for gold prospecting, gem collecting, and classifying material on the go.
